articles.title: After Bengal Assembly Revolt, Is A TMC Rebellion Brewing In Parliament Too? Party MP Drops Big Hint
articles.description: Veteran TMC Rajya Sabha MP Sukhendu Sekhar Roy warned that the developments in the West Bengal Assembly could have repercussions in Parliament as well.

articles.title: ‘Not Everyone Works In IT’: Bengaluru Woman Questions Rising Rents and Salary Assumptions by Landlords
articles.description: A Bengaluru woman says landlords often assume every tenant earns a high IT salary, making it harder for non-tech workers to find affordable homes in the city.

articles.description: If passed, the bill could impact Indians massively, as roughly 7 of every 10 H-1B workers in the US are Indian-born.

articles.title: Cockroach Janata Party protest Live Updates: Delhi Police Has Granted Permission For Protest At Jantar Mantar
articles.description: The Cockroach Janata Party (CJP) is holding a protest at Jantar Mantar after receiving permission from Delhi Police. Founder Abhijeet Dipke has urged supporters to gather directly at the venue and maintain a peaceful demonstration. Follow this live blog for real-time updates on the protest, crowd turnout, police arrangements, key statements, traffic advisories and all developments from the ground in New Delhi.

articles.description: Renu Bala, a second-term MLA from the reserved seat, was among the five MLAs suspended by the Congress on April 16 for allegedly cross-voting in the Rajya Sabha elections held on March 16

articles.description: Tensions between India and Pakistan have escalated following a terror attack in Pahalgam, with Pakistan accusing India of planning a river-linking project that would violate the Indus Waters Treaty (IWT).

articles.title: US shoots down Iranian drones aiming for Hormuz
articles.description: The US military shot down four Iranian drones near the Strait of Hormuz and struck coastal radar sites in response, escalating tensions. This action comes as the Trump administration increases pressure on Iran, impacting regional maritime traffic and global energy prices. The US also boarded a sanctioned oil tanker and imposed new sanctions on Iran's energy sector.

articles.title: Bhiwani teacher death case: Mahapanchayat called tomorrow
articles.description: People in the know said that representatives from different Khaps will gather at Dhani Laxman village in Bhiwani to decide their future strategy

articles.title: SC: Can’t use OSA to deny accused access to documents relied on by prosecution
articles.description: The Supreme Court has ruled that an accused's right to a fair trial includes access to prosecution documents, even if classified under the Official Secrets Act. The court ordered the government to provide highly confidential documents to retired Major General V.K. Singh, facing charges for revealing secrets in his book, emphasizing fair trial rights.

articles.title: E-rickshaws drive anti-drug campaign deeper into Punjab villages
articles.description: Under the pilot project, covering roughly one-third of all villages across 23 districts of the state, one assembly segment per district has been identified

articles.title: 'Secretly served as Cuban agent': Sen. Cruz GRILLS Dem witness on citizenship at EXPLOSIVE hearing
articles.description: At a Senate Judiciary Committee hearing on Wednesday, Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) questioned Professor Peter Spiro about denaturalization.

articles.title: Annamalai quits BJP; new movement attracts 10 lakh members in hours
articles.description: K Annamalai quit the BJP, citing different views on Tamil Nadu. His new movement, 'Idhu Namma Iyakkam', gained over 10 lakh members in 10 hours, a milestone he celebrated on X. BJP's Nitin Nabin accepted his resignation.

articles.title: Sheikh Hazza bin Zayed offers condolences on passing of Dr Al Qaisiya
articles.description: Sheikh Hazza bin Zayed Al Nahyan, Ruler's Representative in Al Ain Region, offered condolences on the death of Dr Mahmoud Ahmed Al Qaisiya. He attended the mourning majlis in Abu Dhabi and extended his sympathies to the family for their loss.

articles.title: British PM criticises Vance over comments about UK teen's stabbing death
articles.description: British PM criticises Vance over comments about UK teen's stabbing death

articles.title: ‘You're F***Ing Crazy, Be In Prison': Bombshell Claim About Explosive Trump-Netanyahu Call
articles.description: Fresh attention is being drawn to the relationship between Donald Trump and Benjamin Netanyahu after an Israeli opposition rabbi quoted what he described as a fiery exchange between the two leaders during a speech at the Knesset. According to the remarks, Trump angrily confronted Netanyahu over the direction of the conflict and broader regional tensions. The comments quickly spread across Israeli political circles and social media, fueling speculation about disagreements behind closed doors between Washington and Jerusalem. Reports have also linked the dispute to concerns over ongoing military operations and their potential impact on wider diplomatic efforts in the region.

articles.title: Trump Goes Full Throttle? Shock Military Move Rocks NATO Nation As Pentagon Abandons Germany
articles.description: Fresh uncertainty is sweeping through NATO as reports suggest the Trump administration is moving toward canceling a key Tomahawk missile arrangement with Germany. The development comes amid broader questions over Washington's long-term role in Europe's security architecture. U.S. officials reportedly fear the deployment could be viewed by Moscow as a major escalation, while European allies worry it could weaken deterrence at a time of heightened tensions with Russia. Germany has increasingly emphasized the need for long-range precision strike capabilities, particularly as Russia maintains advanced missile systems in Kaliningrad and Belarus. The reported review of the missile deal adds to growing concerns across NATO about future U.S. commitments, burden-sharing, and the alliance's readiness in an increasingly volatile security environment.

articles.title: 'Abused and manipulated': Sarah Kellen drops big names in new Epstein revelations before House Oversight Committee
articles.description: Jeffrey Epstein's former assistant, Sarah Kellen, has testified before the House Oversight Committee. She detailed allegations of grooming, abuse, and manipulation by Epstein. Kellen also mentioned prominent individuals connected to Epstein's network. Her testimony has reignited scrutiny into the financier's scandal and the handling of the case over the years.

articles.title: Justice Alito is waiting on one 30-year-old case before he calls it quits
articles.description: Justice Samuel A. Alito Jr. won't retire until the Supreme Court overturns a roughly 30-year-old religious liberty precedent.

articles.title: 'Using Lebanon as bargaining chip': President Joseph Aoun accuses Iran of interference
articles.description: In an interview broadcast by CNN on Friday, Aoun addressed Iran's Revolutionary Guards directly, declaring, "It's not your country, it's our country... It's not your job to interfere into our country."

articles.title: Spanish Proverb of the Day: “A young woman is to an old man the... — Life lessons on desire, temptation, self-control, and why impulsive choices often lead to unintended consequences
articles.description: Spanish Proverb of the Day highlights a traditional saying that reflects historical attitudes toward age, gender roles, and moral interpretation in older cultural expressions. The proverb “A young woman is to an old man the horse that he rides to hell” is a metaphorical statement that uses extreme imagery to express caution about desire, temptation, and relationships with significant age differences.

articles.title: Karnataka CM change reflects growing public anger against Congress misrule: PM Modi
articles.description: PM Modi: Karnataka CM change reflects public anger in Karnataka as PM Narendra Modi criticises Congress at Surat event highlighting infrastructure projects and development push in Gujarat and across India after Karnataka leadership change remarks PM

articles.title: Pressure on Modi over Russia ties to fail: Putin
articles.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin asserts that US pressure on India concerning its relationship with Moscow is futile. He emphasizes that Russia does not perceive India's expanding cooperation with Washington and other nations as a threat to their bilateral ties. Putin expressed confidence in the future of India-Russia economic relations, projecting bilateral trade to reach $100 billion.

articles.title: Japan PM Takaichi may visit next month
articles.description: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi may visit India in July for an annual summit. This visit aims to boost cooperation in security and economic matters. Discussions will focus on China's increasing influence and energy security. The trip's dates depend on Japan's parliamentary schedule. Takaichi might also visit Assam. This would be her first visit to India as Prime Minister.

articles.title: Minister Ramalinga Reddy quits DK Shivakumar cabinet within two days over portfolio row
articles.description: Karnataka's political landscape has shifted dramatically with the resignation of minister Ramalinga Reddy from the cabinet. His departure, which came before he officially took charge of his portfolio, stems from his disappointment over not being awarded the Greater Bengaluru Development position. This incident has created a stir, leading the administration of DK Shivakumar into a challenging predicament.

articles.title: PMK holds multi party meeting demanding caste survey
articles.description: PMK chief Anbumani Ramadoss urges Tamil Nadu caste survey at multi-party meet, citing updated socio-economic data and defending 69% reservation policy.

articles.description: The decision was taken at a meeting convened by TMC chairperson and West Bengal chief minister Mamata Banerjee at her residence

articles.description: When political factions fracture, control over this single office can determine which group achieves formal legitimacy and who is relegated to political obscurity

articles.title: Raichur district completes 85.70% mapping so far
articles.description: Raichur district has successfully mapped 85.70% of eligible voters ahead of the 2025 electoral rolls revision.

articles.title: TMC To Move Court Over Recognition Of Bengal LoP, Kalyan Banerjee Targets Ritabrata Banerjee
articles.description: TMC will move court Monday challenging recognition of the Leader of the Opposition in the West Bengal Assembly, calling it legally untenable and escalating TMC BJP tensions.

articles.title: India’s Cockroach Party fights attempts to discredit the movement
articles.description: On this edition of Access Asia, we explore how India’s nascent Cockroach Janta Party has tapped into the frustrations of the country’s youth. We speak with the party’s spokesperson, Saurav Das, who tells us that the movement is demanding accountability from the government. Political scientist Christophe Jaffrelot also weighs in on why young people in India are disillusioned and what the country’s opposition parties can learn from the viral movement.

articles.title: Vijayanagara launches Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls; draft list on August 5
articles.description: Vijayanagara initiates Special Intensive Revision of electoral rolls; draft list to be published on August 5.

articles.title: Audience Questions 'Hostility to Dissent' in India at CJI's London Lecture - Vid...
articles.description: A moderator had to intervene during a public lecture given by Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant at the Birkbeck College of the University of London after one of the members of the audience posed a question on dissent being allegedly suppressed in India.

articles.title: Putin Signals Openness To Peace Deal As Zelensky Pushes For Direct Talks
articles.description: Russian President Vladimir Putin said Moscow remains open to a peace agreement with Ukraine if both sides can reach acceptable terms. The remarks came after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy published an open letter calling for direct talks and proposing a face-to-face meeting to end the war. The Kremlin confirmed Putin is aware of the proposal, while the Russian leader also said proposals backed by U.S. President Donald Trump could form the basis of a future settlement. Whether a Putin-Zelensky meeting takes place remains uncertain as both sides continue to differ on key issues.

articles.title: IRGC Takes On Two US Warships At Once 'Racing Towards' Iran Coast; Missiles Fired, Troops On Alert
articles.description: A fresh maritime confrontation has emerged in the Gulf of Oman, with Iran claiming its navy challenged two U.S. Navy destroyers operating near Iranian waters. According to Iranian state media, warning shots were fired and missiles and drones were deployed during the encounter, prompting the American vessels to change course. Tehran also claimed that the USS Tripoli amphibious assault ship left the area. Iranian officials warned that longer-range missiles could be used if U.S. ships return. The United States has not confirmed the incident and has not publicly responded to the claims. The reports come amid continuing tensions following the recent conflict involving Iran, the United States, and Israel, as diplomatic efforts and military signaling continue to unfold simultaneously across the region.
